title: centaurea paniculata subsp. rigidula
intro: Centaurea paniculata subsp. rigidula, also known as rigid centaury or stiff centaury, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea paniculata subsp. rigidula include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system. Centaurea paniculata subsp. rigidula can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosages.
